caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a top knot and curls speaks into a professional black microphone during a podcast recording. She is wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red and white circular graphic on the chest and black over-ear headphones. She is positioned in front of a black backdrop that displays the text "BOSS TALK 101," "It's A Unique Hustle," "PODCAST," and "Talk About It!" A framed picture hanging on the wall behind her depicts a person's hands. To her left, a small glass of water and a black table are visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues talking, her facial expressions shifting as she speaks, while her posture and the surrounding equipment remain static. A small logo containing the text "BOSS TALK 101" is overlaid on the lower left and right sides of the screen.
